description_long: This is a round wooden table with a rich, dark brown finish and three tapered legs. The tabletop features four circular recessed areas symmetrically arranged around a central black circular inlay, which may serve as a decorative or functional element. The wood grain is visible, giving the table a natural and elegant appearance. The legs are slender and angled outward, providing stability and a mid-century modern aesthetic. The table's surface is smooth and appears well-polished, with no visible drawers or additional attachments. This design is both functional and visually appealing, suitable for communal or casual settings.
description: A round, dark brown wooden table with three tapered legs and four recessed circular areas around a central black inlay. The surface is smooth and polished, with visible wood grain.
description_view_0: The table is seen from the front, showing all three legs and the four recessed circles clearly arranged around the central black inlay.
description_view_1: This view highlights the left side of the table, with the recessed circles and central inlay still visible but the rightmost leg partially obscured.
description_view_2: The table is rotated further, showing the right side; the arrangement of the recessed circles and the central inlay remain prominent.
description_view_3: The rear view of the table, with the three legs visible and the recessed circles and central inlay still clearly defined.
